questions.template: Express the number {n} × 10^{p} in proper scientific notation. Give the COEFFICIENT (rounded to 2 decimal places).
Express the number {n} × 10^{p} in proper scientific notation. Give the EXPONENT (integer).
A bacterium has a mass of {n} × 10^{p} grams. Express in proper scientific notation. Give the COEFFICIENT (rounded to 2 decimal places).
